entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The pearl millet downy mildew pathogen studied for virulence and genetic diversity

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The host crop affected by Sclerospora graminicola

entities.name: VIRULENCE
entities.description: The degree of pathogenicity of Sclerospora graminicola isolates

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation in genetic characteristics among Sclerospora graminicola isolates

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the pathogen isolates were collected

entities.name: LATENT PERIOD
entities.description: The time interval between inoculation and the appearance of symptoms

entities.name: DISEASE INCIDENCE
entities.description: The proportion of plants showing disease symptoms

entities.name: VIRULENCE INDEX
entities.description: A metric calculated as disease incidence multiplied by the inverse of the latent period

entities.name: OOSPORE-PRODUCTION POTENTIAL
entities.description: The ability of the pathogen to produce oospores

entities.name: RAJASTHAN
entities.description: An Indian state from which the most virulent isolate Sg 139 was collected

entities.name: TAMIL NADU
entities.description: An Indian state from which the least virulent isolate Sg 110 was collected

entities.name: AFLP MARKERS
entities.description: Amplified Fragment Length Polymorphism markers used to analyze genetic diversity

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: The disease caused by Sclerospora graminicola in pearl millet

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW RESISTANCE BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing pearl millet varieties resistant to downy mildew
